headlines.title: After 4 Israeli soldiers’ deaths, Israel and Hezbollah agree to renew ceasefire
headlines.summary: Clashes in Lebanon seemed to imperil the U.S.-Iran peace deal, and U.S. and Iranian officials postponed negotiations planned in Switzerland before the agreement.

headlines.title: Trump said Italy’s prime minister ‘begged’ for a photo. She says that’s false.
headlines.summary: Italy’s right-wing prime minister, Giorgia Meloni, was labeled Europe’s “Trump whisperer,” but the war in Iran turned their friendship into a liability for her.

headlines.title: Andy Burnham wins U.K. Parliament seat, key step in bid to oust prime minister
headlines.summary: Burnham, the mayor of Greater Manchester, is now positioned to challenge Prime Minister Keir Starmer for leadership of the governing Labour Party and to seize the top job.

headlines.title: U.S. moves toward troop reductions in Europe as Hegseth scolds NATO allies
headlines.summary: The United States will review force levels and is immediately cutting the number of assets it would activate for the continent in a crisis.

headlines.title: First steps in peace deal demand far more from U.S. than Iran
headlines.summary: The memorandum of understanding requires numerous steps by Washington including lifting sanctions and freeing billions in frozen assets, while Iran was required only to open the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Iran says US must pressure Israel as deadly attacks on Lebanon test deal
headlines.summary: Iranian deputy foreign minister says Iran 'ready to move forward' on diplomacy with US, but war must end on all fronts.

headlines.title: US judge rejects Joe Biden’s lawsuit asking to withhold memoir recordings
headlines.summary: Biden, a former Democratic president, argued that releasing the recordings would violate his right to privacy.

headlines.title: Does Trump have to submit the Iran memorandum of understanding to Congress?
headlines.summary: A 2015 law requiring congressional approval for any Iran nuclear deal is in the spotlight after this week's memo.

headlines.title: US announces new round of Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington next week
headlines.summary: Talks come as Hezbollah, Israel say new ceasefire has been reached in wake of US-Iran memorandum to end war.

headlines.title: Israel kills ‘a child a day’ on average in Gaza despite ceasefire, UN says
headlines.summary: 'No ceasefire can be considered meaningful while children continue to be killed' says UNICEF.

headlines.title: James Burrows, director of classic shows 'Cheers' and 'Friends,' dies at 85
headlines.summary: Burrows spent his career behind the camera specializing in situation comedies. Few viewers recognized him or knew his name, other than to see it flash quickly on the screen in the opening credits. But they knew his work.

headlines.title: Air Force One, gifted to Trump from Qatar, arrives at Joint Base Andrews
headlines.summary: The luxury Boeing 747, initially valued at $400 million, arrived ahead of schedule on Friday. The jet caused controversy as one of the biggest foreign gifts ever received by the U.S. government.

headlines.title: Italy's Meloni, once Trump's closest ally in Europe, says he made up a story about her
headlines.summary: "Italy and I do not beg," Meloni said in a video rebuke posted on social media Friday. Italy's top diplomat, meanwhile, said he was cancelling a visit to the U.S because of the alleged remarks.

headlines.title: Algae clouded Trump's vision for the Reflecting Pool. But scientists aren't surprised
headlines.summary: The shallow, sunny waters of the reflecting pool are an ideal incubator for algae growth in the summertime. Experts say the recent renovation may have helped accelerate it.

headlines.title: US-Iran talks in Switzerland canceled. And, DHS to give police facial recognition app
headlines.summary: The U.S.-Iran talks that were set to happen in Switzerland have been canceled. And, the Department of Homeland Security has plans to give some local police access to ICE facial recognition technology.

headlines.title: Nepal looks to strengthen collaboration with China
headlines.summary: Nepal's new government is looking to strengthen political engagement with China and expand cooperation in areas including connectivity, technology, governance and people-to-people exchanges, Foreign Minister Shisir Khanal says.

headlines.title: US Fed holds interest rate steady
headlines.summary: WASHINGTON - The US Federal Reserve on Wednesday kept the target range for the federal funds rate unchanged at 3.5-3.75 percent.

headlines.title: France ends contract with US tech giant
headlines.summary: As part of a European push to curb reliance on United States technology companies, France's domestic intelligence service has dropped US giant Palantir in favor of French rival ChapsVision, said France's Prime Minister Sebastien Lecornu on Tuesday.

headlines.title: Accord to end war on 'all fronts'
headlines.summary: Ahead of a widely publicized official signing of a memorandum of understanding between Iran and the United States, both sides indicated they would reveal more about the agreed-upon conditions, which include ending the war on "all fronts".

headlines.title: Japan slammed over slow probe into embassy attack
headlines.summary: China has criticized the lack of progress in Japan's investigation into and handling of a case involving a Self-Defense Forces officer who allegedly entered the Chinese embassy in Tokyo armed with a knife, urging Japan to take full responsibility for the incident.

headlines.title: Desertions, resignations and arrests of Trinamool Congress leaders continue in West Bengal
headlines.summary: Ex-Bengal minister Jyoti Priya Mallick resigns from TMC posts due to health issues, following a recent party reshuffle.

headlines.title: ‘Operation Tiger’: Aaditya Thackeray calls six dissident Shiv Sena (UBT) MPs ‘shameless and ungrateful’
headlines.summary: Aaditya Thackeray condemns dissident Sena MPs as ungrateful amid speculation of a party split and ministerial disputes.

headlines.title: Supreme Court refuses urgent hearing on plea to defer June 21 NEET-UG retest
headlines.summary: Supreme Court declines urgent hearing on NEET-UG retest plea from anxious students seeking more preparation time before June 21 exam.

headlines.title: Supreme Court asks tribunal to speed up advocate’s appeal in SIR row
headlines.summary: Supreme Court instructs tribunal to expedite a 75-year-old advocate's appeal regarding electoral roll deletion in West Bengal.

headlines.title: Parliamentary panel seeks clarity from government. on future engagement with Pakistan
headlines.summary: Panel quizzes on fostering “people-to-people” ties with Pakistan amid calls for normal relations, contingent on violence-free conditions.

headlines.title: Woman killed, 1,700 evacuated in beach hotel fire in Dominican Republic
headlines.summary: Reuters: Woman killed, 1,700 evacuated in beach hotel fire in Dominican Republic.

headlines.title: Trump tells Axios he no longer views Anthropic as national security threat
headlines.summary: Reuters: Trump tells Axios he no longer views Anthropic as national security threat.

headlines.title: EXCLUSIVE: Canadian lender TD tells some employees it will use software to monitor their work
headlines.summary: Reuters: EXCLUSIVE: Canadian lender TD tells some employees it will use software to monitor their work.

headlines.title: Poland strips Zelenskiy of top honour as WW2 dispute sours ties
headlines.summary: Reuters: Poland strips Zelenskiy of top honour as WW2 dispute sours ties.

headlines.title: Zelenskiy says Belarus should remove equipment used in attacks on Ukraine in one week
headlines.summary: Reuters: Zelenskiy says Belarus should remove equipment used in attacks on Ukraine in one week.

markets.label: Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS

hackerNews.title: How to feed a dictator
hackerNews.summary: In an often chilling new documentary, the chefs of brutal leaders from Idi Amin to Saddam Hussein, talk about their unusual lives behind the scenes

hackerNews.title: Think of the children: How to force real ID for all internet traffic (2023)
hackerNews.summary: nochan.net: Think of the children: How to force real ID for all internet traffic (2023).

hackerNews.title: There are no instances in ATProto
Norway imposes near ban on AI in elementary school
hackerNews.summary: reuters.com: Norway imposes near ban on AI in elementary school.

hackerNews.title: Surprising Economics of Load-Balanced Systems
hackerNews.summary: The M/M/c model may not behave like you expect.

hackerNews.title: Hyundai buys Boston Dynamics
hackerNews.summary: Hyundai Motor Group is acquiring SoftBank's remaining 9.65% stake in Boston Dynamics for $325 million, completing its full ownership of the robotics

hackerNews.title: Aikido Code Audit
hackerNews.summary: SAST catches patterns. Code Audit reasons through your code like an attacker would, finding the logic flaws that only show up after you ship.

hackerNews.title: Bobby Prince, composer for Doom, Wolfenstein 3D, and Duke Nukem 3D, has died
hackerNews.summary: View Robert “Bobby” Caskin Prince lll's obituary, send flowers, find service dates, and sign the guestbook.

hackerNews.title: Hey, n00b, we didn't hire you to complete tasks
Project Valhalla, Explained: How a Decade of Work Arrives in JDK 28
hackerNews.summary: The new JVM Weekly is here... and Ragnarok seems to come, as we finally have Valhalla in the JDK. However, situation is a bit... nuanced.

summarySections.title: News and markets
sentences: Global headlines: After 4 Israeli soldiers’ deaths, Israel and Hezbollah agree to renew ceasefire (Clashes in Lebanon seemed to imperil the U.S.-Iran peace deal, and U.S. and Iranian officials postponed negotiations planned in Switzerland before the agreement); Trump said Italy’s prime minister ‘begged’ for a photo. She says that’s false. (Italy’s right-wing prime minister, Giorgia Meloni, was labeled Europe’s “Trump whisperer,” but the war in Iran turned their friendship into a liability for her); and Andy Burnham wins U.K. Parliament seat, key step in bid to oust prime minister (Burnham, the mayor of Greater Manchester, is now positioned to challenge Prime Minister Keir Starmer for leadership of the governing Labour Party and to seize the top job).
Markets leaned lower, with 4 of 7 tracked indexes down; NASDAQ Composite up 1.91% was the largest move.
Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes.

summarySections.title: Hacker News and Product Hunt
sentences: Hacker News: How to feed a dictator (In an often chilling new documentary, the chefs of brutal leaders from Idi Amin to Saddam Hussein, talk about their unusual lives behind...); Think of the children: How to force real ID for all internet traffic (2023) (nochan.net: Think of the children: How to force real ID for all internet traffic (2023)); and There are no instances in ATProto (Like RSS and Google Reader).

Product Hunt features just f***ing send it (Send any file, any size, straight from browser to browser), Midjourney Scanner (60 second ultrasound-based full-body scanner that beats MRI), and Zernio WhatsApp API (One API for WhatsApp: messaging, calling, and AI agents).
